name: EdwBhiMbrCobItemSplitLoad

sqlReaderQuery.value: WITH cte1 AS (SELECT A.MBR_UNIQ_KEY, A.MBR_EFF_DT_SK, A.MBR_TERM_DT_SK, B.MBR_COB_TYP_CD, B.MBR_COB_EFF_DT_SK, B.MBR_COB_TERM_DT_SK FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EDWOwner}.W_BHI_MBR_ENR A JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EDWOwner}.W_BHI_MBR_COB B ON A.MBR_UNIQ_KEY=B.MBR_UNIQ_KEY WHERE B.MBR_COB_TYP_CD='COM' AND A.MBR_EFF_DT_SK<=B.MBR_COB_TERM_DT_SK AND A.MBR_TERM_DT_SK>=B.MBR_COB_EFF_DT_SK), cte2 AS (SELECT MBR_UNIQ_KEY, MBR_EFF_DT_SK, MBR_TERM_DT_SK, MBR_COB_TYP_CD, CASE WHEN MBR_COB_EFF_DT_SK IS NULL THEN 'NULL' ELSE MBR_COB_EFF_DT_SK END AS MBR_COB_EFF_DT_SK, CASE WHEN MBR_COB_TERM_DT_SK IS NULL THEN 'NULL' ELSE MBR_COB_TERM_DT_SK END AS MBR_COB_TERM_DT_SK FROM cte1), cte3 AS (SELECT MBR_UNIQ_KEY, MBR_EFF_DT_SK, MBR_TERM_DT_SK, MBR_COB_TYP_CD, MBR_COB_EFF_DT_SK, MBR_COB_TERM_DT_SK, CASE WHEN cte2.MBR_EFF_DT_SK<cte2.MBR_COB_EFF_DT_SK THEN cte2.MBR_EFF_DT_SK ELSE 'NULL' END AS BEG_EFF_DT_SK, CASE WHEN cte2.MBR_EFF_DT_SK<cte2.MBR_COB_EFF_DT_SK THEN CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), DATEADD(DAY,-1,CAST(SUBSTRING(cte2.MBR_COB_EFF_DT_SK,1,4)+'-'+SUBSTRING(cte2.MBR_COB_EFF_DT_SK,5,2)+'-'+SUBSTRING(cte2.MBR_COB_EFF_DT_SK,7,2) AS DATE)),112) ELSE 'NULL' END AS BEG_TERM_DT_SK, CASE WHEN cte2.MBR_COB_EFF_DT_SK<cte2.MBR_EFF_DT_SK THEN cte2.MBR_EFF_DT_SK ELSE cte2.MBR_COB_EFF_DT_SK END AS MID_EFF_DT_SK, CASE WHEN cte2.MBR_TERM_DT_SK<cte2.MBR_COB_TERM_DT_SK THEN cte2.MBR_TERM_DT_SK ELSE cte2.MBR_COB_TERM_DT_SK END AS MID_TERM_DT_SK, CASE WHEN cte2.MBR_TERM_DT_SK>cte2.MBR_COB_TERM_DT_SK THEN CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), DATEADD(DAY,1,CAST(SUBSTRING(cte2.MBR_COB_TERM_DT_SK,1,4)+'-'+SUBSTRING(cte2.MBR_COB_TERM_DT_SK,5,2)+'-'+SUBSTRING(cte2.MBR_COB_TERM_DT_SK,7,2) AS DATE)),112) ELSE 'NULL' END AS END_EFF_DT_SK, CASE WHEN cte2.MBR_TERM_DT_SK>cte2.MBR_COB_TERM_DT_SK THEN cte2.MBR_TERM_DT_SK ELSE 'NULL' END AS END_TERM_DT_SK FROM cte2) SELECT * FROM cte3
